# Grob

> High-performance LLM routing proxy written in Rust. Routes requests to Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, DeepSeek, Ollama, and 200+ models via OpenRouter with automatic failover, format translation between Anthropic and OpenAI APIs, streaming support, tool calling, DLP scanning, spend tracking, and budget enforcement.

## Guides

- [Quick Start](docs/QUICKSTART.md): Install and run Grob in 30 seconds
- [Getting Started](docs/tutorials/getting-started.md): Step-by-step tutorial from install to running
- [Provider Setup](docs/PROVIDERS.md): Per-provider configuration guides for all 13+ supported backends
- [OAuth Setup](docs/OAUTH_SETUP.md): OAuth authentication for Anthropic Pro/Max and Gemini Pro subscriptions

## Reference

- [Configuration Reference](docs/CONFIGURATION.md): All TOML config options with defaults and examples
- [CLI Reference](docs/reference/cli.md): All CLI commands and flags
- [OpenAI Compatibility](docs/openai-compatibility.md): `/v1/chat/completions` endpoint details, supported features, and limitations
- [OpenAPI Specification](docs/openapi.yaml): Full API reference in OpenAPI 3.0 format
- [Error Reference](docs/reference/errors.md): HTTP status codes and error types
- [Troubleshooting](docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md): Common errors, diagnostics, and fixes

## How-to

- [How to Configure Grob](docs/how-to/configure.md): Budgets, fallbacks, routing rules, tracing
- [How to Deploy Grob](docs/how-to/deploy.md): Container, Kubernetes, systemd deployment
- [How to Contribute](docs/how-to/contribute.md): Development workflow, code style, CI

## Architecture

- [Architecture Overview](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): Request flow, module layout, and key design decisions
- [Design Principles](docs/design-principles.md): Philosophy, writing principles, and UX guidelines
- [Security Model](docs/explanation/security.md): Threat model, defense layers, TLS, audit logging
- [Gemini Integration](docs/gemini-integration.md): Gemini and Vertex AI provider specifics

## Decisions

- [ADR-0001: Static config](docs/decisions/0001-static-config-no-hot-reload.md): Why no hot reload
- [ADR-0002: Custom OAuth](docs/decisions/0002-custom-oauth-no-crate.md): Why no oauth2 crate
- [ADR-0003: Regex routing](docs/decisions/0003-regex-routing-engine.md): Why regex-based routing
- [ADR-0004: Persistent spend](docs/decisions/0004-persistent-spend-tracking.md): Why redb for spend tracking
- [ADR-0005: Anthropic-native trait](docs/decisions/0005-anthropic-native-provider-trait.md): Why Anthropic as the internal format

## Source

- [Entry point](src/main.rs): CLI argument parsing and command dispatch
- [Library root](src/lib.rs): Module declarations
- [Trait contracts](src/traits.rs): 7+ core traits (LlmProvider, RequestRouter, DlpPipeline, SpendTracking, etc.)
- [Provider trait](src/providers/mod.rs): LlmProvider trait definition and provider types
- [Router](src/router/mod.rs): Regex-based request classification and model selection
- [Dispatch pipeline](src/server/dispatch/mod.rs): DLP, cache, routing, provider loop with fallback
- [Provider loop](src/server/dispatch/provider_loop.rs): Fallback/retry logic per mapping
- [Server](src/server/mod.rs): Axum HTTP server, middleware stack, and application state
- [CLI config](src/cli/mod.rs): AppConfig and all configuration structs
- [Config structs](src/cli/config.rs): ServerConfig, SecurityConfig, RouterConfig, etc.
- [Commands](src/commands/mod.rs): CLI command implementations
- [Storage](src/storage/mod.rs): Unified redb storage backend (GrobStore)
- [Spend tracking](src/features/token_pricing/spend.rs): Monthly spend with budget enforcement
- [DLP engine](src/features/dlp/mod.rs): Secret/PII scanning with Aho-Corasick
- [MCP tool matrix](src/features/mcp/mod.rs): Tool-calling capability catalogue and scoring

## Configuration

- [Configuration Reference](docs/CONFIGURATION.md): All TOML options
- [Example configs](docs/examples/): Sample configurations for common setups
- [Presets](presets/): Built-in preset configurations (perf, medium, cheap, fast, local, gdpr, eu-ai-act)
